Thanks for the contribution. Quick checklist before submitting:

1. Linked issue? (small PRs without an issue are fine; medium/large PRs should
   reference one — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
2. `npx tsc --noEmit` passes locally
3. `cd cli && go build ./...` passes locally (only if you touched cli/)
-->
